title: Visualize, import, and export Microsoft Dataverse data
summary: This learning path will show you how to use various Dataverse views, explore how Power Query can load data into Dataverse tables, and how to use Dataverse with third-party tools.

sections.title: Visualize, import, and export Microsoft Dataverse data
sections.summary: This learning path will show you how to use various Dataverse views, explore how Power Query can load data into Dataverse tables, and how to use Dataverse with third-party tools.

lessons.title: Visualize data with Dataverse views
lessons.content_md:
Discover the different types of Dataverse views and how to create and edit them.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/visualize-data/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Use Power Query to load data in Dataverse
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to synchronize data from different sources to a Microsoft Dataverse table using Power Query and create dataflows in Power Apps.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-power-query/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use Power Query to load data in Dataverse

lessons.title: Use Microsoft Word and Excel templates with Dataverse
lessons.content_md:
Explore how you can create data analysis and standardized documents by using Microsoft Dataverse data along with Microsoft Word and Excel templates.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-word-excel-dataverse/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use Microsoft Word and Excel templates with Dataverse

lessons.title: Export data from Dataverse and use Microsoft Excel to edit records
lessons.content_md:
Discover how to export and edit Microsoft Dataverse table data using Excel files, while understanding security concepts.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/export-dataverse-excel/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Export data from Dataverse and use Microsoft Excel to edit records

lessons.title: Use Azure and external tools to manipulate data
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure and external tools to manipulate data.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-azure-dataverse/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Use Azure and external tools to manipulate data

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Visualize, import, and export Microsoft Dataverse data
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Visualize, import, and export Microsoft Dataverse data**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
